languages.text:
Deal 15 direct damage to a target and pulls you to it. If you have melee weapon equipped, perform an attack afterwards.
Range -- {uip|Range|fa6bb19dd177482f8308e57bb1538c5a}

traits.locale_text:
Deal 15 direct damage to a target and pulls you to it. If you have melee weapon equipped, perform an attack afterwards.
Range -- {uip|Range|fa6bb19dd177482f8308e57bb1538c5a}

languages.text: The user deals 15 {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}direct damage{/g} to an enemy within {uip|Range|fa6bb19dd177482f8308e57bb1538c5a} cells. Then, they are pulled to that enemy. If the user has a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapon equipped, they attack that enemy.
languages.original_text:
Deal 15 direct damage to a target and pulls you to it. If you have melee weapon equipped, perform an attack afterwards.
Range -- {uip|Range|fa6bb19dd177482f8308e57bb1538c5a}

traits.locale_text: The user deals 15 direct damage to a target within {uip|Range|fa6bb19dd177482f8308e57bb1538c5a} cells and moves to a cell adjacent to it. If the user has a melee weapon equipped, they attack the target.

The user deals 15 direct damage to a target within {uip|Range|fa6bb19dd177482f8308e57bb1538c5a} cells and moves to a cell adjacent to it. If the user has a melee weapon equipped, they attack the target.

The user deals 15 {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}direct damage{/g} to an enemy within {uip|Range|fa6bb19dd177482f8308e57bb1538c5a} cells. Then, they are pulled to that enemy. If the user has a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapon equipped, they attack that enemy.

The user deals 15 {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}direct damage{/g} to an enemy within {uip|Range|fa6bb19dd177482f8308e57bb1538c5a} cells. Then, they are pulled to that enemy. If the user has a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapon equipped, they attack that enemy.

The user deals 15 {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}direct damage{/g} to a target within {uip|Range|fa6bb19dd177482f8308e57bb1538c5a} cells and moves to a cell adjacent to it. If the user has a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapon equipped, they attack the target.

languages.text: Обладатель аугмента наносит 15 {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}прямого урона{/g} противнику в пределах {uip|Range|fa6bb19dd177482f8308e57bb1538c5a} клеток и подтягивается к нему. Если у обладателя аугмента экипировано оружие {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}ближнего боя{/g}, то он атакует этого противника.
languages.original_text: The user deals 15 {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}direct damage{/g} to an enemy within {uip|Range|fa6bb19dd177482f8308e57bb1538c5a} cells. Then, they are pulled to that enemy. If the user has a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapon equipped, they attack that enemy.

traits.locale_text: Обладатель аугмента наносит 15 {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}прямого урона{/g} цели в пределах {uip|Range|fa6bb19dd177482f8308e57bb1538c5a} клеток и перемещается на соседнюю с ней клетку. Если у обладателя аугмента экипировано оружие {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}ближнего боя{/g}, он атакует эту цель.

Обладатель аугмента наносит 15 {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}прямого урона{/g} цели в пределах {uip|Range|fa6bb19dd177482f8308e57bb1538c5a} клеток и перемещается на соседнюю с ней клетку. Если у обладателя аугмента экипировано оружие {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}ближнего боя{/g}, он атакует эту цель.

languages.text: El usuario inflige 15 de {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}daño directo{/g} a un enemigo situado a {uip|Range|fa6bb19dd177482f8308e57bb1538c5a} casillas o menos. Después, es atraído hacia ese mismo enemigo. Si el usuario empuña un arma {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}cuerpo a cuerpo{/g}, ataca al enemigo.
languages.original_text: The user deals 15 {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}direct damage{/g} to an enemy within {uip|Range|fa6bb19dd177482f8308e57bb1538c5a} cells. Then, they are pulled to that enemy. If the user has a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapon equipped, they attack that enemy.

traits.locale_text: El usuario inflige 15 de {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}daño directo{/g} a un enemigo situado a {uip|Range|fa6bb19dd177482f8308e57bb1538c5a} casillas o menos. Después, es atraído hacia ese mismo enemigo. Si el usuario empuña un arma {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}cuerpo a cuerpo{/g}, ataca al enemigo.

languages.text: Der Nutzer fügt einem Gegner in einem Radius von {uip|Range|fa6bb19dd177482f8308e57bb1538c5a} Feldern 15 {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}Direktschaden{/g} zu. Anschließend wird er zu diesem Gegner gezogen. Hat der Nutzer eine {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}Nahkampfwaffe{/g} ausgerüstet, attackiert er diesen Gegner.
languages.original_text: The user deals 15 {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}direct damage{/g} to an enemy within {uip|Range|fa6bb19dd177482f8308e57bb1538c5a} cells. Then, they are pulled to that enemy. If the user has a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapon equipped, they attack that enemy.

traits.locale_text: Der Nutzer fügt einem Gegner in einem Radius von {uip|Range|fa6bb19dd177482f8308e57bb1538c5a} Feldern 15 {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}Direktschaden{/g} zu. Anschließend wird er zu diesem Gegner gezogen. Hat der Nutzer eine {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}Nahkampf{/g}waffe ausgerüstet, attackiert er diesen Gegner.

languages.text: Kullanıcı, en fazla {uip|Range|fa6bb19dd177482f8308e57bb1538c5a} hücre uzaktaki bir düşmana 15 {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}doğrudan hasar{/g} verir. Ardından o düşmana doğru çekilir. Kullanıcı, {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}yakın dövüş{/g} silahı kuşanmışsa o düşmana saldırır.
languages.original_text: The user deals 15 {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}direct damage{/g} to an enemy within {uip|Range|fa6bb19dd177482f8308e57bb1538c5a} cells. Then, they are pulled to that enemy. If the user has a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapon equipped, they attack that enemy.

traits.locale_text: Kullanıcı, en fazla {uip|Range|fa6bb19dd177482f8308e57bb1538c5a} hücre uzaktaki bir düşmana 15 {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}doğrudan hasar{/g} verir. Ardından o düşmana doğru çekilir. Kullanıcı, {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}yakın dövüş{/g} silahı kuşanmışsa o düşmana saldırır.

languages.text: L'utilisateur inflige 15 points de {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}dégâts d'impact{/g} à un ennemi dans un rayon de {uip|Range|fa6bb19dd177482f8308e57bb1538c5a} cases, avant d’être attiré vers cette cible. S'il est équipé d'une arme de {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}mêlée{/g}, il attaque l'ennemi.
languages.original_text: The user deals 15 {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}direct damage{/g} to an enemy within {uip|Range|fa6bb19dd177482f8308e57bb1538c5a} cells. Then, they are pulled to that enemy. If the user has a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapon equipped, they attack that enemy.

traits.locale_text: L'utilisateur inflige 15 points de {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}dégâts d'impact{/g} à un ennemi dans un rayon de {uip|Range|fa6bb19dd177482f8308e57bb1538c5a} cases, avant d’être attiré vers cette cible. S'il est équipé d'une arme de {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}mêlée{/g}, il attaque l'ennemi.

languages.text: 使用者对{uip|Range|fa6bb19dd177482f8308e57bb1538c5a}格内的一名敌人造成15点{g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}直击伤害{/g}，并被拉向该敌人。如果使用者装备了{g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}近战{/g}武器，则会攻击该敌人。
languages.original_text: The user deals 15 {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}direct damage{/g} to an enemy within {uip|Range|fa6bb19dd177482f8308e57bb1538c5a} cells. Then, they are pulled to that enemy. If the user has a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapon equipped, they attack that enemy.

traits.locale_text: 使用者对{uip|Range|fa6bb19dd177482f8308e57bb1538c5a}格内的一名敌人造成15点{g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}直击伤害{/g}，并被拉向该敌人。如果使用者装备了{g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}近战{/g}武器，则会攻击该敌人。

languages.text: 使用者は{uip|Range|fa6bb19dd177482f8308e57bb1538c5a}マス以内の敵に15の{g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}直接ダメージ{/g}を与える。その後、使用者はその敵の元へ引き寄せられる。使用者が{g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}近接{/g}武器を装備している場合、その敵を攻撃する。
languages.original_text: The user deals 15 {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}direct damage{/g} to an enemy within {uip|Range|fa6bb19dd177482f8308e57bb1538c5a} cells. Then, they are pulled to that enemy. If the user has a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapon equipped, they attack that enemy.

traits.locale_text: 使用者は{uip|Range|fa6bb19dd177482f8308e57bb1538c5a}マス以内の敵に15の{g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}直接ダメージ{/g}を与える。その後、使用者はその敵の元へ引き寄せられる。使用者が{g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}近接{/g}武器を装備している場合、その敵を攻撃する。
